title: A portfolio should work like a sales room
excerpt: A strong personal site does more than display work. It frames trust, taste, process, and the next action.
content:
A portfolio is not a gallery wall. It is a sales room. The visitor arrives with limited context, scans for taste, checks for proof, and decides whether the person behind the work understands business pressure.

The job of the interface is to make that decision easier. Strong hierarchy, clear case logic, fast performance, and memorable interaction all serve the same goal: turn attention into confidence.
